description: Acme Corp is spinning off its Sales and Marketing divisions into a separate entity. The restructuring directive has been placed on your Desktop at ~/Desktop/spinoff_manifest.txt. You must execute this restructuring in Sentrifugo exactly as specified: Create the new 'Vendor Management' department, transfer the retained employees (EMP011 and EMP019) to it so they remain active, deactivate all other employees in Sales and Marketing, and finally deactivate the Sales and Marketing departments themselves. Do not alter employees in other departments.
